task: interactive community search in online social networks
input: query vertex and a subgraph collected on the fly from an online network
output: a k-sized community (kMG) containing the query vertex
backbone: Graph Neural Network (GNN) for vertex classification
loss: ranking loss combined with GNN training
key_idea: interactively build a candidate subgraph, train a GNN to score vertex membership, and discover the target community with user feedback
